---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Propose a new capability, visualization, or CRM module integration for Synapse OS"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "feature"]
assignees: []
---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I am frustrated when trying to track pipeline logs because..."

### Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of the feature or integration you want to build.

### Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

### UI/UX Visual Concept
Describe how the feature fits into the Synapse OS dashboard structure (e.g., as a sub-tab inside the Client Finder, a new chart in the Executive Hub, etc.).

### Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or API endpoint documentations here.
